UI_quick_tip_naninhas_a1K7mP: Attach a plushie before leaving base. Even a small passive buff helps a lot.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_b4R2xD: Swap plushies based on your task: stealth, looting, or combat.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_c9V5tL: Use a night-vision plushie before dusk so you can loot better.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_d3N8qH: Never leave base without a plushie.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_e6J1wS: Reading with a plushie can help you stay focused.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_f2Y4pK: On carpentry days, equip Jacques before hammering your first plank.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_g7C3mR: In panic situations, the right plushie helps calm you down.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_h5L9vB: Rainbow Spiffo and Santa are great for keeping morale up on rainy days.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_i8T6kN: Aiming practice goes really well with Spiffo Shamrock.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_k3U7dX: Equip the right plushie for each task to get the most from its benefits.
UI_quick_tip_naninhas_n2B5rV: Before entering dangerous places, consider hugging your plushie.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_a6Q3mZ: A plushie on your backpack is emotional armor, with bonus stats included.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_b1H8tR: Yes, the teddy is coming. No, this is not open for debate.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_c4K2pL: Survivor rule: never remove the backpack mascot.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_d9X5vN: The horde fears one thing: a determined adult with a plush fox on their backpack.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_e3M7cB: You call it a toy. I call it a survival artifact.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_f8T1qD: Inventory gets better when your plushie judges your choices.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_g2R6wK: No buff, no vibe. No vibe, mission canceled.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_h7V4zP: If it attaches to a backpack, it is tactical now.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_i5C9mX: Some survivors carry extra ammo. You carry extra personality.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_j1N3tH: Trust me: plushie first, panic later.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_k6L8pS: The plushie is small. The confidence boost is not.
UI_quick_tip_joke_naninhas_l4D2xQ: If morale had a hotbar slot, it would be your plushie.
